programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: After Danny witnesses a drive-by shooting, he butts heads with the detective assigned to the case; a childhood friend of Jamie's is convinced that she has single-handedly solved a cold case murder.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Next Level Chef
programme.desc: The chefs are challenged to create one perfect appetizer dish and pair it with a beautiful craft cocktail; one chef's dreams come to an end.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie cooks sardines on the grill and serves them with watercress salad, figs and crispy haloumi; dessert is a thick chocolate mousse.

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie prepares steak Indian-style, with spinach and paneer salad, naan breads, and a mango dessert.

programme.title: The Good Stuff With Mary Berg
programme.desc: From fashion to beauty to décor to restaurant quality eats, Mary and her experts reveal their favourite dupes; the cast of "Degrassi: Whatever It Takes.".

programme.title: Mary Makes It Easy
programme.desc: Mary shows how versatile meal planning can be with four recipes.

programme.title: Spencer's BIG 30
programme.desc: Spencer makes a budget-friendly fish dinner.

programme.title: MasterChef Canada
programme.desc: The cooks compete in a team challenge at the Canadian Canoe Museum, to honour Indigenous agriculture.

programme.title: The Amazing Race Canada
programme.desc: Teams land in Prince George, B.C. where they see green before making a splash. Plus, the Double Blind Pass returns.

programme.title: Mary Makes It Easy
programme.desc: Leftovers can seem uninspiring, but Mary gives them new life by showing how to use them as ingredients in brand new recipes.

programme.title: Spencer's BIG 30
programme.desc: Spencer creates a taco night fiesta.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Erin tries not to feel overpowered as her new boss shadows her at work just as she's trying to get a nervous eyewitness to reveal the identity of who shot her boyfriend; Jaime arrests an intrusive reporter who appears at a series of store lootings.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Baez confides in Danny and asks for his help in proving her innocence after she finds a corpse in her front yard; Erin struggles to find a peaceful solution when she receives harsh case notes from her boss.

programme.desc: Chicken skewers with satay sauce; a fiery noodle salad; fruit and mint sugar.

programme.desc: Teams land in Prince George, B.C. where they see green before making a splash. Plus, the Double Blind Pass returns.

programme.title: Thirst With Shay Mitchell
programme.desc: Shay Mitchell explores the world one drink at a time as she visits exotic locations, samples unique ingredients, and meets expert hosts; on her journey, she encounters the latest drink trends, the best bars, and 8,000 years of sipping history.

programme.desc: Cheese, nuts and charcuterie meats prove difficult for the chefs to navigate; the "time token" causes one chef to decide between sabotage or security.

programme.title: Pets & Pickers
programme.desc: Dr. Ward removes a blind cat's eyes in order to give it a pain-free life; a dwarf kitten battling an unusual dental condition, sees Dr. Schwartz enlist the expertise of Dr. Vasilescu; three playful sugar gliders make for a chaotic exam.

programme.desc: Contestants take their cue from a gooey mystery box lift and incorporate goo into a dessert.

programme.desc: Spencer creates a family spaghetti dinner.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank asks Erin to help with policy reform he privately backs but can't publicly support; Danny and Baez become enmeshed in the world of competitive gaming when a high-profile video game streamer is murdered.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank takes matters into his own hands to save Gormley's career when complaints against him become public knowledge; Danny and Baez learn to be allies when the transgender community comes under attack.
